name: video-transcript-downloader
tagline: ClawHub (86★): Download videos, audio, subtitles, and clean paragraph-style transcripts from YouTube and any other yt-dlp supported site. U
verdict: Quality is decent (B), but there's no 'NOT for' scope guidance despite the skill covering several distinct subcommands where misfire is plausible, and no version field or changelog to know if it's changed. An unpinned-but-well-known Homebrew package is the least of its problems.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope guidance appears anywhere in the description or body, and the skill covers several distinct subcommands (not a single fixed command) where m
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the document.
